{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065041CAC6FB26FF464F8CB7B4"}"},"total":143},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549781444873437977","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"卡在最精彩的地方，后面才开始追的小伙伴实锤羡慕你们"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757822084,"group_id":"7526234239931517977","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活往往在不经意间给人以惊喜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7tEIy5uxzuKCh/dR1T1pQA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94d89293ef664f2f898145ca52064d0d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700907&x-signature=OCRneG7hS5fpAf87yFHpqPStFyg%3D","user_id":"111451225047","user_name":"牢财"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111451225047","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7526234239931517977","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越】+【系统】+【无敌】+【穿越各个大事件】+【神级召唤】
  穿越海贼世界，辰叶开局就被追杀，偶遇莫比迪克号，激活【神级时空召唤系统】！本以为能召唤神兵天降，却发现能量为零。绝境之下，他凭借影帝级演技“碰瓷”白胡子，成为其“傻儿子”，并激活核心功能【神之解析】！
    只要接触传奇人物，就能解析其巅峰数据，构筑专属卡池！当解析度达到100%，更能融合其巅峰时期一半的实力！
    【叮！白胡子解析100%，融合50%震震果实与无上霸王色！】
    【叮！雷利解析100%，融合50%冥王剑术与顶级三色霸气！】
    顶上战争，当全世界都以为白胡子海贼团陷入绝境，辰叶站在船头，身后是召唤出的巅峰白胡子、巅峰雷利还有巅峰尼卡路飞？
战国“怎么会有两个白胡子？”
辰叶微微一道：到底谁包围谁？
    从弥补顶上战争的遗憾开始，到逆转英雄卡普的落幕，再到亲历神之谷的终极一战……辰叶一步步收集着传说时代的力量，将所有传说的力量集于一身。
    当他最终踏上圣地玛丽乔亚，面对虚空王座上的最终黑手时，他的身后，站着的是来自过去、现在、未来的所有传说！“伊姆，你的八百年伪神统治，到此为止了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6a04adf7864ba4f57b8efcaedf6fad15","author":"阿溪仁德","author_id":"","book_id":"7526234239931517977","book_name":"海贼：顶上摇人！你管这叫绝境？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7530303457186546200","read_count":"31916","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1076673"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"478","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,升级流,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0d1c212bc4e15ee8c672666378f58a2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317442&x-signature=EtUC6wWJGVDZCSbWLaIEJS2iHB4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2230271574293694","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322065041CAC6FB26FF464F8CB7B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2
